steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence states that UNESCO chooses sites for their cultural or natural value to preserve for future generations.

Accordingly signals a result, showing that the addition of Kiribati’s area follows from the general selection criterion. The other three either contrast, merely list a next step, or rephrase the idea, none of which convey the causal link. That matches choice D — D is correct.
